
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rabbit|kanji=己卯|romaji=tsuchinoto usagi|onyomi=kibō|p=jǐmǎo|w=chi-mao|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ mɑʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 maau5|j=gei2 maau5|ci=kei maːu̯|mc=kɨj maw|oc-bs=kɯʔ maw|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 16th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bodonotora|ja|1=Yang Earth Tiger|2=ja|戊寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bodonotora|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Tiger|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rabbit|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16662792}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: kimi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

==Years of Yin Earth Rabbit==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 19 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 19|en|AD 19|qid=Q23761|lt=19 AD|1=AD 19}}
* {{ill|AD 79|en|AD 79|qid=Q23859|lt=79 AD|1=AD 79}}
* {{ill|AD 139|en|AD 139|qid=Q31319|lt=139 AD|1=AD 139}}
* {{ill|199|en|199|qid=Q33067|lt=199 AD|1=199}}
* {{ill|259|en|259|qid=Q31531|lt=259 AD|1=259}}
* {{ill|319|en|319|qid=Q32360|lt=319 AD|1=319}}
* {{ill|379|en|379|qid=Q37154|lt=379 AD|1=379}}
* {{ill|439|en|439|qid=Q32352|lt=439 AD|1=439}}
* {{ill|499|en|499|qid=Q32727|lt=499 AD|1=499}}
* {{ill|559|en|559|qid=Q34043|lt=559 AD|1=559}}
* {{ill|619|en|619|qid=Q31055|lt=619 AD|1=619}}
* {{ill|AD 679|en|AD 679|qid=Q23451|lt=679 AD|1=AD 679}}
* {{ill|739|en|739|qid=Q23588|lt=739 AD|1=739}}
* {{ill|799|en|799|qid=Q33488|lt=799 AD|1=799}}
* {{ill|859|en|859|qid=Q23897|lt=859 AD|1=859}}
* {{ill|919|en|919|qid=Q23787|lt=919 AD|1=919}}
* {{ill|979|en|979|qid=Q23784|lt=979 AD|1=979}}
|
* {{ill|1039|en|1039|qid=Q19341|lt=1039 AD|1=1039}}
* {{ill|1099|en|1099|qid=Q19496|lt=1099 AD|1=1099}}
* {{ill|1159|en|1159|qid=Q19659|lt=1159 AD|1=1159}}
* {{ill|1219|en|1219|qid=Q5388|lt=1219 AD|1=1219}}
* {{ill|1279|en|1279|qid=Q5534|lt=1279 AD|1=1279}}
* {{ill|1339|en|1339|qid=Q6051|lt=1339 AD|1=1339}}
* {{ill|1399|en|1399|qid=Q6422|lt=1399 AD|1=1399}}
* {{ill|1459|en|1459|qid=Q6524|lt=1459 AD|1=1459}}
* {{ill|1519|en|1519|qid=Q6278|lt=1519 AD|1=1519}}
* {{ill|1579|en|1579|qid=Q6709|lt=1579 AD|1=1579}}
* {{ill|1639|en|1639|qid=Q6897|lt=1639 AD|1=1639}}
* {{ill|1699|en|1699|qid=Q7710|lt=1699 AD|1=1699}}
* {{ill|1759|en|1759|qid=Q7643|lt=1759 AD|1=1759}}
* {{ill|1819|en|1819|qid=Q6967|lt=1819 AD|1=1819}}
* {{ill|1879|en|1879|qid=Q7783|lt=1879 AD|1=1879}}
* {{ill|1939|en|1939|qid=Q18639|lt=1939 AD|1=1939}}
* {{ill|1999|en|1999|qid=Q2091|lt=1999 AD|1=1999}}
|
* {{ill|2059 AD|ja|2059年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2059|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2059 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2119 AD|ja|2119年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2119|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2119 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2179 AD|ja|2179年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2179|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2179 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2239 AD|ja|2239年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2239|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2239 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2299 AD|ja|2299年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2299|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2299 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2359 AD|ja|2359年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2359|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2359 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2419 AD|ja|2419年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2419|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2419 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 25世紀|1=25th century|qid=Q49839}}
* {{ill|2479 AD|ja|2479年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2479|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2479 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2539 AD|ja|2539年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2539|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2539 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2599 AD|ja|2599年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2599|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2599 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2659 AD|ja|2659年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2659|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2659 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2719 AD|ja|2719年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2719|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2719 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2779 AD|ja|2779年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2779|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2779 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2839 AD|ja|2839年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2839|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2839 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2899 AD|ja|2899年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2899|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2899 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2959 AD|ja|2959年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2959|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2959 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}
==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|February|en|February|qid=Q109|lt=February|1=February}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|qid=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects|1=Jingzhe}} until the day before {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|qid=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 2nd day of {{ill|Small Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Small Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11571306}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=ja|己卯|version=84123759|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1062557|af|Aardkonyn (astrologie)|cdo|Gī-māu|de|Erde-Hase|fr|Lièvre de terre|hak|Kí-mâu|ja|己卯|ko|기묘|nds|Eer-Haas|vi|Kỷ Mão|za|Geijmaux|zh-min-nan|Kí-báu|zh-yue|己卯|zh|己卯|zh-min-nan|Kí-chhá|cdo|Kí-cṳ̄de|nds|Erd-Haseni|de|Yin Earth Rabbit|af|Aardehaas (astrologie)|de|Erde-Haseni|en|Earth Rabbit|fr|Lièvre de terreboishak|it|Ki-chṳ́id|za|Keiceij|ar|Yin Earth Rabbit}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
